results.title: Glenwood
results.album: I Feel The Everblack Festering Within Me

feedback.comment: This is just OK - there are some tacks I'm confused about being in here ('Olivia Dean — Man I Need' and 'Marshmello — Numb'). Otherwise it's fine.
Good overall list - still puts similar titles in there - could use more diversity

results.title: Whiplash
results.album: The Sky, The Earth & All Between

feedback.comment: Good - but still some odd tracks in here (eg. 'Elmiene — Useless (Without You)') which don't really belong.
I really like some of the older stuff coming in  - but things like 'Olivia Dean — Man I Need' are out of place
